title: Portfolio Risk Forecaster
summary: Forecast portfolio stress signals and package scenario summaries for risk committees.
knowledge_base: Portfolio Risk Forecaster is positioned as a Asset Management starter that emphasizes fast iteration, clear documentation, and production-friendly interfaces.
The primary value proposition is: Forecast portfolio stress signals and package scenario summaries for risk committees.
Recommended operating model: ship a small API, add observability, validate outputs with stakeholder review, and monitor the top business KPI every week.
Typical stakeholders include analytics, operations, product, and leadership teams working on portfolio, forecasting, risk.
